neighborhoods.name: Historic District
neighborhoods.description: Savannah's iconic core with 22 tree-canopied squares, antebellum architecture, and cobblestone streets along the riverfront
neighborhoods.character: Urban historic, extremely walkable, tourist-adjacent, elegant

housing.predominantType: Restored Victorian rowhouses, carriage houses, and luxury condos

neighborhoods.character_notes: One of the most walkable neighborhoods in the American South. Tourists concentrate on River Street and around Forsyth Park. SCAD students add creative energy.

neighborhoods.name: Ardsley Park
neighborhoods.description: Gracious early-20th-century neighborhood south of the Historic District with wide boulevards, mature oaks, and a strong community feel
neighborhoods.character: Established residential, tree-lined, family and retiree friendly

housing.predominantType: Craftsman bungalows, Colonial Revival homes, and brick Tudor-style houses

neighborhoods.character_notes: Daffin Park offers tennis, pool, and walking paths. Close to good restaurants on Bull Street. Quieter than downtown but still close.

neighborhoods.name: Tybee Island
neighborhoods.description: Small barrier island beach community 20 minutes east of Savannah with a laid-back vibe, lighthouse, and year-round residents
neighborhoods.character: Beach community, casual, small-town, seasonal tourist activity

housing.predominantType: Beach cottages, elevated houses, and small condos

neighborhoods.character_notes: Year-round population of about 3,000 swells in summer. Casual flip-flop lifestyle. Flood insurance required. Strong sense of community among permanent residents.

neighborhoods.name: Pooler
neighborhoods.description: Fast-growing suburb west of Savannah with new construction, shopping centers, and proximity to the airport
neighborhoods.character: Modern suburban, affordable, convenient, rapidly developing

housing.predominantType: New-construction single-family homes in planned communities

neighborhoods.character_notes: Close to Savannah/Hilton Head International Airport. Tanger Outlets and big-box retail. Popular with military retirees from nearby bases.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living Savannah area

neighborhoods.name: Isle of Hope
neighborhoods.description: Historic waterfront community on a bluff overlooking the Skidaway River, with moss-draped oaks and a marina

housing.predominantType: Historic homes and waterfront properties, some dating to the 1800s

neighborhoods.character_notes: Bluff Drive along the river is one of the most beautiful streets in Georgia. Wormsloe Historic Site is nearby. Very quiet -- car required.
